level_signals: 5+ years of experience in payment processing
Expected to drive product strategy and influence senior stakeholders
End-to-end ownership of acquirer and PSP integrations

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of experience in payment processing, with strong expertise in the card acquiring domain and hands-on experience building acquiring-related products

Deep domain knowledge of acquiring and payment networks (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), including scheme rules, pricing, risk considerations, reconciliation, real-time transaction processing, clearing, and settlement lifecycle
Strong technical acumen - you understand APIs, system architectures, and can deliver technically complex products while communicating effectively with engineering teams
Strategic thinking - you can connect technical details to broader business outcomes, balancing short-term priorities with long-term product vision
Data-driven approach - track record of using data and customer insights to make decisions, run experiments, and measure impact
Excellent stakeholder management - ability to influence senior stakeholders, build relationships with external partners, and align cross-functional teams
Problem-solving excellence - you systematically break down complex problems and make good decisions in ambiguous situations where there's often no "right answer"
Ownership mentality - intellectually honest about your work's performance, relying on data to measure success and continuously striving for improvement

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience managing acquirer and PSP integrations from end-to-end
Familiarity with both card-present and card-not-present processing concepts
Experience with scheme certifications, audits, and compliance milestones
Track record of optimizing payment performance metrics and reducing processing costs
Experience navigating complex organizational environments and driving change

scope.surface: European acquiring operations and payment processing platform (card acquiring capabilities, acquirer/PSP integrations, CP processing)
scope.business_model: B2SMB fintech — card acceptance and payment processing for small merchants
primary_metrics_inferred: Transaction approval rates / merchant payment performance
core_responsibilities: Define and drive product strategy for card acquiring capabilities
Build and maintain relationships with Visa, Mastercard, Amex, acquirers, and PSPs
Own end-to-end acquirer and PSP integrations across European operations
Partner with engineering to shape product requirements and lead product development from discovery through launch
Drive data-driven optimization of transaction flows and CP processing KPIs
Act as key liaison between external partners and internal teams
Navigate compliance and regulatory changes proactively

green_flags: Clear and specific domain focus (European card acquiring) — not a vague generalist PM role
JD explicitly notes candidates do not need to meet 100% of criteria
Strong perks package including sabbatical leave, learning budget, 10 educational vacation days, and 25+ PTO days
Global fintech company (3000+ employees, 22 offices) with clear product mission
red_flags: Visa sponsorship and work authorization policy not mentioned
Location (city) only inferred from office description ('amazing Sofia view') — not explicitly stated in the role posting
No information on remote or hybrid eligibility
